'''Horley''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who lived at [[Fort Nowhere]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. 

One day in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], he was serving as sentry to the town when [[Carole Grawley]] called, asking the whereabouts of her husband [[Grif Grawley|Grif]] who didn't return home; that night Grif showed up, entering the town on foot. Asking about [[Byron Devo III|the mayor]], Horley directed him to the [[Smuggler's Rest (Ruusan)|Smuggler's Rest]]. He was puzzled when Grif said that soon the mayor will have more trouble from [[Imperial Remnant|the Empire]] than he already had.

Horley was killed in an [[Battle of Fort Nowhere|ensuing battle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1st}}
